articles.title: Emil Michael, now a senior Pentagon official, says he’ll never forgive Uber investors who ousted him and Kalanick
articles.description: When asked whether he was still "salty" about about being shown the door at Uber, alongside co-founder Travis Kalanick, Michael didn't equivocate.
articles.author: Connie Loizos

articles.title: Bengaluru food delivery startup Swish raises $38M, its third round in 18 months
articles.description: Swish has more than doubled its valuation in a year as its full-stack, hyperlocal model positions ultra-fast food delivery as a high-frequency habit.
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh

articles.title: Despite bitter rivalry, Kalshi, Polymarket CEOs back $35M predictions markets VC fund
articles.description: As prediction markets explode, the new firm called 5(c) Capital, will back startups supporting the burgeoning category.
articles.author: Marina Temkin

articles.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
articles.description: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.
articles.author: Dominic-Madori Davis

articles.title: Apple Maps may be about to get ads
articles.description: Apple Maps may soon serve ads in top results when users search on terms like "restaurants."
articles.author: Lucas Ropek

articles.title: Someone has publicly leaked an exploit kit that can hack millions of iPhones
articles.description: Leaked "DarkSword" exploits published to GitHub allow hackers and cybercriminals to target iPhone users running old versions of iOS with spyware,
articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai, Zack Whittaker

articles.title: Zipline snaps up another $200M to fuel its drone delivery expansion
articles.description: The funding adds to a previous round, announced in January, that valued the drone startup at $7.6 billion.
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec

articles.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI ‘gotcha’ video flops, but the memes are great
articles.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Russian authorities block paywall removal site Archive.today
articles.description: A notice on the popular paywall-bypass website Archive.today said that access is blocked "by decision of [Russian] public authorities."
articles.author: Zack Whittaker

articles.title: Bipartisan bill seeks to ban sports betting on Kalshi and Polymarket
articles.description: Since FanDuel and DraftKings are subject to state-by-state gambling laws, rather than federal law, they would not be impacted by the bill.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Vibe-coding startup Lovable is on the hunt for acquisitions
articles.description: Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe-coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Apple sets June date for WWDC 2026, teasing ‘AI advancements’
articles.description: Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: DoorDash introduces relief payments for drivers as the Iran-US war drives up gas prices
articles.description: Gas is one of the largest expenses for delivery drivers. With prices continuing to surge, DoorDash is offering a lifeline to Dashers with a new
articles.author: Lauren Forristal

articles.title: Leonid Radvinsky, the owner of  OnlyFans, has passed away
articles.description: OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky has passed away at the age of 43 after a battle with cancer.
articles.author: Lauren Forristal

articles.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
articles.description: Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: Littlebird raises $11M for its AI-assisted ‘recall’ tool that reads your computer screen
articles.description: Littlebird is building an AI that reads your screen in real time to capture context, answer questions, and automate tasks, without relying on
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Grab to buy Foodpanda Taiwan from Delivery Hero for $600 million
articles.description: Grab will acquire Delivery Hero’s Foodpanda business in Taiwan for $600 million, expanding beyond Southeast Asia and setting up a closer challenge to
articles.author: Kate Park

articles.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
articles.description: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as
articles.author: Ram Iyer
